items.html: Patreon has blocked AI training crawlers from scraping creator content via Cloudflare — published work is now opt-out-by-default for model training.

Apple's 41-page lawsuit alleges OpenAI systematically extracted confidential hardware and software secrets through coordinated employee recruitment — the case has expanded significantly since first filed.
A director flattened a 3D character's head using Blender's Lattice modifier to convincingly fake wide-angle lens distortion — a clever compositing trick worth stealing.
Claude subscribers in India can now pay in rupees directly — India is already Claude's second-largest market at 5.8% of global usage, with UPI still pending.
Defenders are now using "context bombing" prompt injection to neutralize malicious AI agents before they execute — a new tactic worth knowing if you run automated pipelines.
Riverskin's motion-captured aerial dance short showcases advanced Maya rigging and character design built with deliberate artistic control — a strong reference for creature and armor pipelines.

brief.title: Monday, July 13 — six things creators need to know

tooldrop.name: MuScriptor
tooldrop.blurb: Open-weight model from Kyutai that transcribes multi-instrument audio recordings into MIDI. Useful for musicians who want to extract notation or stems from existing tracks.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft by former employee
stories.dek: Apple claims a security bug allowed a departed engineer to maintain confidential server access after joining OpenAI, alleging conspiracy to steal proprietary information.

stories.title: Director Antonio Milo breaks down CGI parasite character campaign in Unreal Engine
stories.dek: SuperBlimp's Captain Itch campaign demonstrates hand-keyed character animation, Houdini grooming, and Unreal rendering pipeline for stylized creature design with deliberate artistic control.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI for alleged trade secret theft and employee poaching
stories.dek: Apple's 41-page complaint alleges OpenAI systematically extracted confidential information through current and former employees, including requests for unreleased hardware at interviews.

stories.title: Apple alleges OpenAI systematically stole trade secrets and hardware details
stories.dek: Lawsuit details claims of unauthorized network access, employee recruitment with requests for proprietary hardware, and coordinated information extraction.

stories.title: Patreon blocks AI crawlers from scraping creator content for model training
stories.dek: Patreon partnered with Cloudflare to prevent AI training crawlers from using published work. CEO Jack Conte framed move as compensation protection for creators.

stories.title: Anthropic localizes Claude pricing to Indian rupees, second-largest market
stories.dek: Claude subscribers in India can now pay in rupees on web and apps, though UPI support still pending. India accounts for 5.8% of global Claude usage.

stories.title: Clément Doranlo showcases motion-captured aerial dance with custom armor in Maya
stories.dek: Riverskin project demonstrates advanced rigging, animation, and character design with deliberate aesthetic choices. Work exhibits technical control and artistic vision across modeling and post-production.

stories.title: Defenders adopt prompt injection tactics to disable malicious AI agents
stories.dek: "Context bombing" uses attacker techniques defensively, flooding AI systems with contradictory instructions to prevent harmful behavior before it executes.

stories.title: Director flattens 3D character head to match wide-angle lens distortion in Blender
stories.dek: Dust of the Simulacrum director Eit Mitsufuchi reveals sophisticated technique: intentional 3D-to-2D morphing using Blender's Lattice modifier for stylized wide-angle effects. Masterful execution of intentional distortion.

stories.title: Blender 5.2 release candidate adds new sculpting brush tools
stories.dek: Blender 5.2 RC introduces scene project brush and sculpting refinements. Solid tooling update for 3D artists.

stories.title: 3D artist creates Wolverine in comic book toon shader style
stories.dek: Tian Jin and Vincent Ménier demonstrate deliberate shader control to achieve stylized comic aesthetic in Blender. Strong technical execution and distinctive visual point of view.

stories.title: Game artist Jenny Mati details multi-tool workflow for scene composition
stories.dek: Creator walks through practical pipeline: Maya base, sketch, V-Ray rendering, and post-work for depth and atmosphere. Concrete technique.

stories.title: Indie team films live-action reference for cinematic platformer Deer & Boy
stories.dek: Developers of Deer & Boy use practical motion reference to animate character movement. Shows deliberate craft and technical discipline in animation workflow.
